titleStmt.title: SII 17.256: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 256. (A.R. No. 234 of 1904.) ŚIṄGAVARAM, GINGEE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north base of the central shrine in the ruined Ādivarāha Perumāḷ temple.
This inscription is dated in the reign of Viruppaṇa-Uḍaiyar, son of Vīra Bokkaṇa-Uḍaiyar. This is dated in Āḍi [June-July] of Kshaya.

It records the making over of Peṟṟāṉ and his brother Ramāṇḍai as tiruviḷakku kuḍi to god Paṉṟi Āḻvār, by the nāṭṭār and Śamaiyamudalis of Kalavai-paṟṟu. It mentions Vaṇḍuvarāpati-chchamayavēḷāṉ as the signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran harirāyavibhāṭan bhāṣaikku tappuvarāyara kaṇṭan śrīvira pokkaṇauṭaiyaru kumārar viruppaṇa Uṭaiyarkku cellāniṉṟa kṣaya varuṣam Āṭi mātamutal perumāḷ paṉṟi Āḻvaārukku tiruviḷakku kuṭi Āka
kalavai paṟṟu nāṭṭārum camayamutaliyārumāka Eṅkaḷ kuṭiyāna peṟṟāṉaiyum Ivaṉ tampi ramāṇṭaiyaiyum cantirātitta varaiyum tiruviḷakku kuṭi Āka viṭṭom vaṇṭuvarāpatic camaiyaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu camaiyamutali Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 17.256 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
